missions.title: Getting Started
missions.dialogue: George: 'Hey, fresh meat! Welcome to the city. First thing you should do — go check out the Gym. Build those stats up or you won't last a week.'
missions.completionDialogue: George: 'You actually went! Here, take these few bucks. Don\'t spend it all on drugs.'

missions.title: Know the Market
missions.dialogue: George: 'The Market is where the real economy happens. Buy weapons, sell loot. Go have a look — knowledge is power.'
missions.completionDialogue: George: 'See? Prices move. Buy low, sell high. Simple.'

missions.title: Down the Alley
missions.dialogue: George: 'The Dark Alley is where crimes go down. Don\'t go unarmed. Go see what\'s lurking there — just don\'t do anything stupid.'
missions.completionDialogue: George: 'Impressive. You\'re braver than you look. Or just dumber.'

missions.title: Know Your Exits
missions.dialogue: George: 'You\'ll end up in the Hospital sooner or later — everyone does. Go find it before you need it urgently.'
missions.completionDialogue: George: 'Good. Now you know where to drag yourself after a fight.'

missions.title: Secure the Bag
missions.dialogue: George: 'One last tip: always bank your cash. If you\'re carrying it and someone mugs you, it\'s gone. Get to the Bank.'
missions.completionDialogue: George: 'Smart. That\'s the last lesson I\'ve got for you. You\'re on your own now, kid. Good luck.'
